name: African Elephant
hint: The largest land animal, known for its long trunk and large ears.

name: Buffalo
hint: A large herbivore with curved horns, often found in groups.

name: Cheetah
hint: The fastest land animal, known for its spotted coat and speed.

name: Dolphin
hint: A marine mammal known for its intelligence and playful behavior.

name: Elephant Seal
hint: A large seal species known for its enormous size and trunk-like nose.

name: Flamingo
hint: A wading bird with long legs and a distinctive pink coloration.

name: Giraffe
hint: A tall, long-necked herbivore with a spotted coat and ossicones on its head.

name: Hippopotamus
hint: A large, semi-aquatic mammal known for its massive size and aquatic habits.

name: Iguana
hint: A large, herbivorous lizard found in tropical regions.

name: Jaguar
hint: A large cat with a distinctive spotted coat, known for its strength and agility.

name: Kangaroo
hint: A marsupial known for its powerful hind legs and pouch for carrying young.

name: Lion
hint: A large carnivorous cat known for its majestic mane and social behavior.

name: Meerkat
hint: A small, social mongoose known for its upright posture and vigilance.

name: Nile Crocodile
hint: A large, predatory reptile found in African rivers and swamps.

name: Ostrich
hint: A flightless bird known for its long legs and fast running speed.

name: Panda
hint: A large bear with distinctive black and white fur, native to China.

name: Quokka
hint: A small herbivorous marsupial known for its friendly and smiling appearance.

name: Rhinoceros
hint: A large, herbivorous mammal known for its thick skin and horn(s) on its snout.

name: Sloth
hint: A slow-moving, arboreal mammal known for its leisurely lifestyle.

name: Tiger
hint: A large carnivorous cat with distinctive orange fur and black stripes.

name: Uakari
hint: A red-faced monkey found in South American rainforests.
